title: xinziafk
description: Some common Anti-AFK features include automatic camera rotation, automatic turning, and creating a transparent screen so that the game doesn't pause when running in the background.
body:
Some common Anti-AFK features include automatic camera rotation, automatic turning, and creating a transparent screen so that the game doesn't pause when running in the background.

If you have any suggestions, you can send them to shixinzia@gmail.com
